abstract: Fetches all user identities in the current user’s address book.
overview:
## Return Value

A `Promise` object that resolves to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.UserIdentitiesResponse] object, or rejects to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object.

## Discussion

Use this method to retrieve information about other users of the app. This method returns information about those users who meet the following criteria:

To get the user identities, use the `users` property in the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.UserIdentitiesResponse] class, which contains an array of [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.UserIdentity] dictionaries.

items.description: Fetches information about the current user asynchronously.
items.name: fetchCurrentUserIdentity

items.description: Fetches all users in the specified array.
items.name: discoverUserIdentities

items.description: Fetches information about a single user based on the user’s email address.
items.name: discoverUserIdentityWithEmailAddress

items.description: Fetches information about a single user based on the user’s phone number.
items.name: discoverUserIdentityWithPhoneNumber

items.description: Fetches information about a single user using the record name.
items.name: discoverUserIdentityWithUserRecordName

title: discoverAllUserIdentities
